title: matelea neblinae
intro: Matelea neblinae, also known as the 'Vine of Death', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Matelea neblinae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are typically used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
